decisions.rationale: IR defines a single bTItY RG under bTItS (FG-services); duplicate data-bubble-id on PathsGridPanel wrapper is a PATHS-02 GetElement-convention artifact superseded by shared pathsEnrollmentStore for ai_RNbBHYHn data parity. PATHS-06 scope owns canonical bTItY on EnrollmentFloatingBar; grid already carries ai_RNbBHYHn on the inner RG. criteria_audit AC-2, functional_audit FV-4, and ui_evidence for bTItY all pass; PATHS-07 depends_on needs store session fields, not unique DOM markers. Remove the grid wrapper bTItY marker (retain ai_RNbBHYHn or data-source attribute) as optional hierarchy polish in a later wave.

AC-3 passes on the primary pathenrollment1 table path via resolveCurrentSessionFields in toListItem; criteria_audit and coverage cite currentSessionId/currentSessionTitle on table rows. deriveListFromOnboardingData omits session fields because PathEnrollmentOnboardingState lacks current_session_custom_pathsession — only focused_m_commitment and completed session lists. Onboarding-only fallback affects prototype/dev when pathenrollment1 is absent; PATHS-07 scope owns URL ?session= matching against enrollment current_session and can extend deriveListFromOnboardingData (e.g. map focused_m_commitment_custom_pathsession[0]) or document table dependency without blocking PATHS-06 store contract.

PATHS-06 layout_notes explicitly specify "horizontal repeating enrollment chips/cards" for the floating FG-services strip — intentional SPA adaptation diverging from Bubble bTItd column container_layout. Review finding acknowledges this is by design; criteria_audit AC-1/AC-2 and ui_evidence pass. Column stacking with 232px min-height is pixel-parity optional, not a named ui_ref AC requirement.

Bubble bTItY RG has no static empty-cell text in the extracted IR tree; "No enrolled paths yet" is React-authored prototype UX consistent with PATHS-02 triage accepting tier-filter empty copy where no IR bubble-id source exists. Grid zero-enrollment copy is IR-grounded via bTJEI (PATHS_GRID_EMPTY_TEXT); floating bar empty state has no canonical IR string to match. No criteria_audit or ui_evidence failure.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 2 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. C-1 deferred: remove duplicate bTItY marker on PathsGridPanel when polishing IR hierarchy (store satisfies GetElement parity). C-2 deferred to PATHS-07-session-completion-route-integration for onboarding-fallback currentSessionId mapping. C-3 accepted: horizontal chip row per PATHS-06 layout_notes. C-4 accepted: no IR empty-state copy for floating bar RG.
